title: Gonzalagunia stenostachya

This classification is based on the plant's morphological and molecular characteristics. Gonzalagunia stenostachya is further classified as a species within the genus Gonzalagunia, which is a group of flowering plants native to tropical regions. The Rubiaceae family is one of the largest and most diverse plant families, comprising over 600 genera and 13,000 species. Gonzalagunia stenostachya is a member of this family, showcasing its unique characteristics and adaptations.
uses: Gonzalagunia stenostachya has potential medicinal uses, particularly in traditional medicine. It is often used to treat various health conditions, including fever and infections.
